---
title: "Introduction to OERs"
format: html

previous:
  href: "../index.qmd"
  text: "Home"

next:
  href: "Intro-What are OERs.qmd"
  text: "What are OERs"
---

### Unit Learning Outcomes

By the end of this unit, learners will be able to:

-   Explain what an OER is, using UN and UNESCO definitions.

-   Describe the purpose and benefits of OERs, including equity, cost savings, representation, and pedagogical innovation.

-   Identify common barriers and misconceptions surrounding OERs.

[![](images/clipboard-1574813119.png){fig-alt="Go to next page:Intro-What%20are%20OERs.html" fig-align="center" width="50"}](Intro-What%20are%20OERs.html)

----------------------
::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
